case_title: ALIAH WARMUND ET AL VS. ROBERT BEACH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-17-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. 506 PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT ALIAH WARMUND IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT ALAN WARMUND IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT ROBERT BEACH IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARMUND, ALIAH WARMUND, ALAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEACH, ROBERT $9,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,140.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY WARMUND, ALIAH WARMUND, ALAN AS TO DEFENDANT BEACH, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF'S ALIAH WARMUND AND ALAN WARMUND ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBERT BEACH IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBERT BEACH FILED A VENUE CHALLENGE AND HONORABLE CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS DETERMINED THAT SAN FRANCISCO IS PROPER VENUE DUE TO THE PROPERTY THAT WAS RENTED BY PLAINTIFF'S IS LOCATED IN SAN FRANCISCO AND WHERE THE RENTAL AGREEMENT WAS EXECUTED. ADDED TO CALENDAR OF MAY 15 ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM DUE TO DEFENDANT NOT BEING PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT - FEE FOR SERVICE 85.00 SERVED MAY-09-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WARMUND, ALIAH

DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT ROBERT BEACH IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT CLAIM IS UNTIMELY.
